channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is known for their energetic live performances and unique blend of genres, making this a highly anticipated show.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses brings a strong electronic vibe with a reputation for captivating live shows, perfect for the Greek Theatre.

item.title: Young the Giant @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-20 01:00 — Young the Giant at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Young the Giant and Cold War Kids together promise a night of powerful indie rock at a beautiful venue.

item.title: SLANDER @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-07-11 03:00 — SLANDER at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. SLANDER is a leading act in the electronic scene, known for their immersive live shows, making this a must-see.

item.title: Widespread Panic @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-07-17 03:00 → 2026-07-19 03:00 — Widespread Panic at Fox Theater - Oakland. An Evening with Widespread Panic offers fans a chance to experience their legendary live performance style.

item.title: Marcus King Band @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-07-08 03:00 — Marcus King Band at Fox Theater - Oakland. Marcus King Band is known for their impressive live performances, blending rock and blues seamlessly.

item.title: YOASOBI @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-15 03:00 — YOASOBI at Oakland Arena. YOASOBI is gaining international attention with their unique sound, making their tour stop a significant event.

item.title: Earlybirds Club @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-07-12 01:00 — Earlybirds Club at August Hall. Earlybirds Club is an emerging act worth catching, especially in an intimate venue like August Hall.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. IVE's world tour is a significant event for K-pop fans, showcasing their rising popularity.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Streetlight Manifesto's energetic ska-punk sound is sure to deliver a lively show at The Regency Ballroom.

item.title: Jose Gonzalez @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-09-26 03:00 — Jose Gonzalez at Uptown Theatre Napa. José González's intimate performance style is perfect for the setting at Uptown Theatre.

item.title: Los Lobos @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-08-10 03:00 — Los Lobos at Uptown Theatre Napa. The Head And The Heart's folk-rock sound resonates well with audiences, making their show a highlight.

item.title: Lionel Richie @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-07 02:30 — Lionel Richie at Chase Center. Lionel Richie and Earth, Wind & Fire together promise a nostalgic evening of classic hits.

item.title: CORTIS @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-08-16 03:00 — CORTIS at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. CORTIS's tour promises an engaging experience, especially in a venue like Bill Graham Civic Auditorium.

item.title: Kruder & Dorfmeister @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-26 03:00 — Kruder & Dorfmeister at Fox Theater - Oakland. Kruder & Dorfmeister's anniversary tour appeals to fans of electronic and downtempo music.

item.title: PRESIDENT @ The UC Theatre
item.description: 2026-10-07 02:00 — PRESIDENT at The UC Theatre. PRESIDENT's North American Campaign is an intriguing event that could attract a diverse crowd.

item.title: Jack Harlow @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-19 03:00 — Jack Harlow at Fox Theater - Oakland. Jack Harlow's tour is highly anticipated, especially among hip-hop fans eager for his latest material.
